Flow.description: Flow 2: Daily cadence scheduler (7 AM CT). Supervised mode — all touches create Tasks for Dylan to review and send manually. No auto-send emails.

formulas.name: Contact_Info
formulas.expression: "Contact: " & {!Loop_Contacts.FirstName} & " " & {!Loop_Contacts.LastName} & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Title}), "", " | " & {!Loop_Contacts.Title}) & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Account.Name}), "", " at " & {!Loop_Contacts.Account.Name}) & BR() & "Specialty: " & IF(ISBLANK(TEXT({!Loop_Contacts.Contact_Specialty__c})), "Unknown", TEXT({!Loop_Contacts.Contact_Specialty__c})) & " | Onboarded: " & IF({!Loop_Contacts.Is_Onboarded__c}, "Yes", "No") & BR() & "Email Verified: " & IF(ISBLANK(TEXT({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Verified__c})), "Unknown", TEXT({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Verified__c})) & BR() & "Intent: " & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Intent_Signals__c}), "None", LEFT({!Loop_Contacts.Intent_Signals__c}, 200) & " (Score: " & TEXT({!Loop_Contacts.Intent_Score__c}) & "/100)") & BR() & "Warming: Opens=" & TEXT({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Opens_Count__c}) & " | LinkedIn=" & IF(ISBLANK(TEXT({!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Connected__c})), "Unknown", TEXT({!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Connected__c}))

formulas.name: Desc_T2
formulas.expression: "Review and send this intro email FROM DYLAN's email address." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Dylan Ragsdale" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Intro__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Intro__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: Touch 1 — LinkedIn connection request" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ After sending: Mark this task Complete"

formulas.name: Desc_T3
formulas.expression: "Review and send this value-add email FROM NIKKI's email address." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Nikki Cummings" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Value1__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Value1__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1 — LI request, T2 — Intro email (Dylan)" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Send from Nikki's email. Mark task Complete after sending."

formulas.name: Desc_T4_LI
formulas.expression: "Review and send this LinkedIn message." & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Message_Draft_1__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Message_Draft_1__c}) & BR() & BR() & "LinkedIn: " & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Profile_URL__c}), "(Not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Profile_URL__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1 — LI request, T2 — Intro (Dylan), T3 — Value email (Nikki)" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Mark Complete after sending."

formulas.name: Desc_T4_Email
formulas.expression: "Review and send this follow-up email FROM DYLAN's email address." & BR() & "LinkedIn not connected — sending substitute email instead." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Dylan Ragsdale" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Sub4__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Sub4__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1 — LI request, T2 — Intro (Dylan), T3 — Value (Nikki)" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Mark Complete after sending."

formulas.name: Desc_T5
formulas.expression: "Call attempt #1." & BR() & BR() & "Phone: " & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Phone}), "(No phone)", {!Loop_Contacts.Phone}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Company Research:" & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Company_Research__c}), "(None)", LEFT({!Loop_Contacts.Company_Research__c}, 500)) & BR() & BR() & "Contact Research:" & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Contact_Research__c}), "(None)", LEFT({!Loop_Contacts.Contact_Research__c}, 500)) & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T4 outreach (LI request, intro email, value email, LI/email follow-up)" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Mark Complete after call attempt."

formulas.name: Desc_T6
formulas.expression: "Review and send this follow-up email FROM DYLAN's email address." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Dylan Ragsdale" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_FollowUp__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_FollowUp__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T5 outreach" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ After sending: Mark this task Complete"

formulas.name: Desc_T7
formulas.expression: "Review and send this value-add email FROM NIKKI's email address." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Nikki Cummings" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Value2__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Value2__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T6 outreach" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Send from Nikki's email. Mark task Complete after sending."

formulas.name: Desc_T8_LI
formulas.expression: "Review and send this LinkedIn message." & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Message_Draft_2__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Message_Draft_2__c}) & BR() & BR() & "LinkedIn: " & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Profile_URL__c}), "(Not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Profile_URL__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T7 outreach" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Mark Complete after sending."

formulas.name: Desc_T8_Email
formulas.expression: "Review and send this follow-up email FROM DYLAN's email address." & BR() & "LinkedIn not connected — sending substitute email instead." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Dylan Ragsdale" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Sub8__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Sub8__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T7 outreach" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Mark Complete after sending."

formulas.name: Desc_T9
formulas.expression: "Call attempt #2 — Contact is showing warming signals." & BR() & BR() & "Phone: " & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Phone}), "(No phone)", {!Loop_Contacts.Phone}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Company Research:" & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Company_Research__c}), "(None)", LEFT({!Loop_Contacts.Company_Research__c}, 500)) & BR() & BR() & "Contact Research:" & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Contact_Research__c}), "(None)", LEFT({!Loop_Contacts.Contact_Research__c}, 500)) & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T8 outreach" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Mark Complete after call attempt."

formulas.name: Desc_T10
formulas.expression: "Review and send this direct ask email FROM DYLAN's email address." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Dylan Ragsdale" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_DirectAsk__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_DirectAsk__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T9 outreach (Stage 3 — Direct Ask)" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ After sending: Mark this task Complete"

formulas.name: Desc_T11
formulas.expression: "Final scheduled call attempt." & BR() & BR() & "Phone: " & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Phone}), "(No phone)", {!Loop_Contacts.Phone}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Company Research:" & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Company_Research__c}), "(None)", LEFT({!Loop_Contacts.Company_Research__c}, 500)) & BR() & BR() & "Full outreach history: T1-T10 (LI, emails, calls, direct ask)" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ This is the final scheduled call. Mark Complete after attempt."

formulas.name: Desc_T12_LI
formulas.expression: "Review and send this LinkedIn follow-up message." & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Message_Draft_3__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Message_Draft_3__c}) & BR() & BR() & "LinkedIn: " & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Profile_URL__c}), "(Not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.LinkedIn_Profile_URL__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T11 outreach (Stage 3 — nearing end of sequence)" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Mark Complete after sending."

formulas.name: Desc_T12_Email
formulas.expression: "Review and send this follow-up email FROM DYLAN's email address." & BR() & "LinkedIn not connected — sending substitute email instead." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Dylan Ragsdale" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Sub12__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Sub12__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T11 outreach" & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ Mark Complete after sending."

formulas.name: Desc_T13
formulas.expression: "Review and send this pause email FROM DYLAN's email address." & BR() & "This is the FINAL touch in the sequence." & BR() & BR() & "To: " & {!Loop_Contacts.Email} & BR() & "From: Dylan Ragsdale" & BR() & BR() & IF(ISBLANK({!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Pause__c}), "(Draft not available)", {!Loop_Contacts.Email_Draft_Pause__c}) & BR() & BR() & {!Contact_Info} & BR() & BR() & "Previous: T1-T12 complete outreach sequence" & BR() & BR() & "After sending, this contact automatically moves to Deferred status. No further touches will be scheduled." & BR() & BR() & "⚠️ After sending: Mark this task Complete"

Flow.label: Cadence Scheduler

value.stringValue: Draft copy for the next touch has not been generated yet. Either follow up manually or wait for the next Gumloop JIT pipeline run to generate the copy. The scheduler will retry automatically on the next run. Do NOT advance this contact manually — the system will pick them up once copy is available.
